entity.summary: Canton Network automated-market-maker exchange integrated into Canton Wallet, supporting live token pools, swaps, liquidity provision, rolling volume reporting, and swap-fee accounting through a public mainnet API.
entity.notes: Current first-party Canton Wallet interfaces expose Pool Party pools and the Send Foundation mainnet validator publishes a rolling public volume and fee API for all live pools. No exact launch date, legal entity, or legal jurisdiction is asserted.

evidence.title: Pool Party pools in Canton Wallet
evidence.notes: First-party Canton Wallet surface for Pool Party's live AMM pools, swaps, liquidity, and headline pool activity.

evidence.title: Pool Party public mainnet volume API
evidence.notes: First-party public API on the Canton Wallet mainnet validator reports rolling 24-hour per-token volume and fees across live Pool Party pools.
